ideation_top_pick.title: I'm building an album for two people who can't hear it yet — here's what that pressure actually sounds like
ideation_top_pick.reason: This is the highest-leverage awareness post Vawn can make right now. It does three things simultaneously: introduces him to new audiences with an immediate emotional hook, establishes the stakes that make every future post matter, and differentiates him from every other independent hip-hop artist posting today. It mirrors the organic vulnerability that drove the 42M-play street session viral moment — real people, real place, real stakes — without being a gimmick. It maps to today's Awareness pillar and sets the emotional foundation for the entire 7-day content arc to follow. The twins as a narrative anchor also creates a recurring character in Vawn's story that audiences can return to and root for.
